sentences.english: What do you think is the most important quality in a good friend?
sentences.korean: 좋은 친구에게 가장 중요한 자질은 무엇이라고 생각하나요?

sentences.english: Use details and examples to explain your answer.
In my opinion, the most important quality in a friend is honesty.
sentences.korean: 제 생각에, 친구에게 가장 중요한 자질은 정직이에요.

sentences.english: A truly good friend tells you the truth even when it's uncomfortable to hear.
sentences.korean: 진정으로 좋은 친구는 듣기 불편할 때도 진실을 말해줘요.

sentences.english: For example, I once spent weeks preparing a presentation that I thought was excellent.
sentences.korean: 예를 들어, 저는 한번 훌륭하다고 생각한 발표를 준비하는 데 몇 주를 보냈어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Gap Year — Good Idea or Not

sentences.english: My friend pointed out several weaknesses in it — which was hard to hear at first — but because of her feedback, I improved it significantly and received a high grade.
sentences.korean: 제 친구가 여러 약점을 지적했는데 — 처음에는 듣기 힘들었지만 — 그녀의 피드백 덕분에 상당히 개선해서 높은 성적을 받았어요.

sentences.english: If she had simply agreed with everything, I would have missed the chance to grow.
sentences.korean: 만약 그녀가 모든 것에 그냥 동의했다면, 저는 성장할 기회를 놓쳤을 거예요.

sentences.english: I think many people prefer friends who just say what you want to hear, but in the long run, an honest friend is far more valuable.
sentences.korean: 많은 사람들이 듣고 싶은 말만 하는 친구를 선호하지만, 장기적으로 정직한 친구가 훨씬 더 가치 있다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: Honesty is the foundation of real trust.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Book That Changed Your Thinking
The Role of Luck in Success
